calendar.description: House Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing
Senate Health and Human Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses non-nicotine inhalation products.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>requires a non-nicotine inhalation product and a non-nicotine inhalation substance to be registered;<hr><ltbullet>establishes civil penalties for selling an unregistered non-nicotine inhalation product or non-nicotine inhalation substance;<hr><ltbullet>creates the criminal offense of illegal distribution of a cannabinoid inhalation product or a cannabinoid inhalation substance;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies that a cannabinoid product does not include an electronic cigarette;<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>includes a clause coordinating this bill and H.B. 385, Specialized Product Sales Amendments; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
